p.c: function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { (x0 - x1).abs = real_distance(x0, x1) }(a, b)

goal: forall(x0: Real, x1: Real) { Complex.from_real(x0).distance(Complex.from_real(x1)) = x0.distance(x1) } = true

p.c: not forall(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0.distance(x1) = Complex.from_real(x0).distance(Complex.from_real(x1)) }
let w0: Real satisfy { exists(k0: Real) { w0.distance(k0) != Complex.from_real(w0).distance(Complex.from_real(k0)) } }
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { Complex.from_real(x0).distance(Complex.from_real(x1)) = x0.distance(x1) }(w0, w2)

goal: is_isometry[Real, Complex](Complex.from_real) = forall(x0: Real, x1: Real) { Complex.from_real(x0).distance(Complex.from_real(x1)) = x0.distance(x1) }

p.c: function[T0: lib(metric_space).MetricSpace, T1: lib(metric_space).MetricSpace](x0: T0 -> T1) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { x1.distance(x2) = x0(x1).distance(x0(x2)) } = is_isometry[T0, T1](x0) }[Real, Complex](Complex.from_real)
